channel.title: Will-O'-the-Wisp on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Will-O'-the-Wisp on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Chir batti: A Ghost Light Phenomenon in Banni Grasslands, Gujarat
item.description:
Chir batti, also known as chhir batti or cheer batti, is a ghost light reported in the Banni grasslands and adjoining desert of the Rann of Kutch in Gujarat, India. Local villagers call it “chir batti,” meaning ghost light, and describe it as an unexplained, bright, and colorful light that moves like a ball of fire. These lights have been a part of local folklore for centuries and are said to appear on dark nights, sometimes misleading travelers. Modern science generally attributes such phenomena to the oxidation of phosphine, diphosphane, and methane produced by organic decay.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chir_batti

item.title: Paasselkä devils
item.description:
Paasselkä devils are light phenomena observed at Lake Paasselkä in Finland and its surrounding areas. These lights, often described as balls of light, can move at various speeds or remain stationary, and sometimes appear in multiples. Local folklore has long referred to these lights as “devils,” with some locals believing them to be conscious entities. The phenomenon, which has been observed for a long time and is part of local mythology, gained wider recognition through a 2006 book.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paasselk%C3%A4_devils
